title: Cosmic Tunnel 3D
description: A high-speed WebGL hardware-accelerated 3D cosmic runner. Accelerate down a continuously morphing, neon cylindrical wormhole. Rotate left and right using pure math matrices to dodge oncoming cybernetic obstacles while collecting glowing tachyon fragments.
prodTitle: Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman (Classified Operative Edition)

title: Grid Delver: 1-Minute Micro-Rogue
description: A crisp 5x5 grid strategic dungeon crawler. Discover stairs, defeat shadow beasts, disarm wire traps, and collect gold tokens under intense 60-second ticking chrono pressure.
prodTitle: Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman

title: Quantum Sentinel: Fast Spatial Reflex
description: Elite high-speed peripheral target defense terminal. Intercept sub-second quantum reticle flashes across complex 2D visual coordinate fields with absolute microsecond precision.

title: Raycasted 3D Doom Labyrinth
description: A 3D pseudo-perspective tactical labyrinth game. Enforces classic raycasting distance vector formulas to render an ultra-smooth, high-frame-rate immersive 3D execution environment.

description: An advanced physics-heavy celestial simulator. Launch planetary bodies around intense stellar masses, computing real-time gravitational pull vectors with precise orbital momentum formulas.

description: Immersive 3D physics-based particle deflection loop. Destroy massive complex volumetric node arrays using dynamic paddle trajectory deflection mechanics.

description: Pure speed reflex override loop. Pilot a supersonic craft along a highly volatile, split-second shifting obstacle path.
